eventBoundary: Examples derived from synthetic fixtures. These are not live customer production events.

events.title: NEC PABX Major Alarm Lamp Lighting
events.description: Synthetic example where NEC PABX major alarm lamp value is 1, indicating lamp lighting.
events.operationalImpact: Potential service impact to airport telephony or operations coordination. Actual impact must be confirmed against site alarm policy and live system state.
events.recommendedAction: Review NEC PABX alarm details, confirm telephony service health, and dispatch qualified maintenance if the major alarm remains active.
correlationHints: Correlate with failure message trap text.
Correlate with communication-loss events to distinguish PABX alarm from SNMP reachability issue.
Correlate with airport telephony service reports if available.

events.title: NEC PABX Major Alarm Lamp Off
events.description: Synthetic example where NEC PABX major alarm lamp value is 0, indicating lamp off.
events.operationalImpact: No major alarm lamp condition indicated by this sample.
events.recommendedAction: No work order recommendation from this clear sample alone.
correlationHints: Use as clear evidence after an active major alarm sample.
Confirm actual clear behavior with live polling/trap evidence.

events.title: NEC PABX Minor Alarm Lamp Lighting
events.description: Synthetic example where NEC PABX minor alarm lamp value is 1, indicating lamp lighting.
events.operationalImpact: Possible degraded telephony condition requiring operational review. This is not a proven outage claim.
events.recommendedAction: Review NEC PABX alarm details and monitor for escalation, repeated alarms, or related failure messages.
correlationHints: Correlate with failure message trap text.
Correlate with major alarm lamp state.
Correlate with customer telephony service indicators if available.

events.title: NEC PABX Supervisor Alarm Lamp Lighting
events.description: Synthetic example where NEC PABX supervisor alarm lamp value is 2, indicating supervisor lamp lighting.
events.operationalImpact: Potential supervision-related telephony alarm requiring operator review.
events.recommendedAction: Confirm supervisor alarm details in NEC PABX management tools and review related failure messages.
correlationHints: Treat value 0 as not available rather than clear.
Correlate with major/minor alarm lamps and failure messages.

events.title: NEC PABX Failure Message Trap Received
events.description: Synthetic example where NEC PABX failure message text is captured as SNMP evidence.
events.operationalImpact: May indicate a telephony fault or operational issue depending on message content. Production severity must be derived from confirmed message semantics.
events.recommendedAction: Review failure message content, correlate with lamp states, and confirm customer operational impact before escalation.

evidenceFields.rawValue: SYNTHETIC FAILURE MESSAGE: PABX alarm message received
evidenceFields.valueMeaning: Failure message text up to 255 characters

correlationHints: Correlate repeated message text into a single fault candidate.
Use raw message as Evidence Center content.

events.title: NEC PABX CPU Usage Warning Candidate
events.description: Synthetic group-level candidate for CPU usage monitoring. Exact NEC cpu child OID is pending verification.
events.operationalImpact: Possible early warning for PABX processing load. No production condition is claimed.
events.recommendedAction: Verify exact CPU OID, unit, threshold, and live sample before enabling alarm behavior.
correlationHints: Correlate only after exact OID and threshold are verified.
Compare with traffic and alarm lamp states once available.

events.title: NEC PABX Port Status Warning Candidate
events.description: Synthetic group-level candidate for circuit card or port status monitoring. Exact NEC port child OID/table structure is pending verification.
events.operationalImpact: Potential telephony service degradation if a circuit card or port is affected. No production condition is claimed.
events.recommendedAction: Verify exact port status table, enum semantics, affected port identity, and site service mapping before enabling alarm behavior.
correlationHints: Correlate with terminal registration data once exact OIDs are verified.
Correlate with customer service impact reports and failure message traps.
